expectations.text: Output contains a '## Work Units' section
Project scaffold and shared types are in foundation
expectations.evidence: Foundation includes monorepo scaffold and shared types.
Prisma schema included in foundation phase.

expectations.text: Auth middleware is in foundation or sequential before routes
expectations.evidence: Auth middleware is in the foundation phase.
Frontend UI is a separate parallel unit.

expectations.text: Backend routes NOT parallel with unbuilt auth middleware
expectations.evidence: Backend routes depend only on foundation (where auth lives).
Frontend unit notes dependency on types/ from foundation.

expectations.text: Dependency analysis identifies backend route dependencies
expectations.evidence: Analysis identifies routes import from types/ and use auth middleware.
